heading: Treatment of podiatrists; clinical oversight standards
label: 7413 Treatment of podiatrists; clinical oversight standards
notes: Codification, which directed that this section be added at the end of subchapter I of chapter 74, without specifying the Code title to be amended, was executed by adding this section at the end of this subchapter, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Section 502(a)(1) of Pub. L. 115–182
amendments: Codification, which directed that this section be added at the end of subchapter I of chapter 74, without specifying the Code title to be amended, was executed by adding this section at the end of this subchapter, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Section 502(a)(1) of Pub. L. 115–182

children.heading: .—Podiatrists
children.label: a .—Podiatrists
children.text: Except as provided by subsection (b), a doctor of podiatric medicine who is appointed as a podiatrist under is eligible for any supervisory position in the Veterans Health Administration to the same degree that a physician appointed under such section is eligible for the position.section 7401(1) of this title

children.heading: .—Establishment of Clinical Oversight Standards
children.label: b .—Establishment of Clinical Oversight Standards
children.text: The Secretary, in consultation with appropriate stakeholders, shall establish standards to ensure that specialists appointed in the Veterans Health Administration to supervisory positions do not provide direct clinical oversight for purposes of peer review or practice evaluation for providers of other clinical specialties.
